justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'tomorrow' and 'around 3 o'clock in the afternoon' and proposed an appointment within the user's specified timeframe.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information in the first turn and successfully booked the appointment in the second turn without any redundant questions or turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's request and confirming the booking clearly.
